# Pull Request

## Summary
What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Type
- [ ] oracle/docs/ — system truth change
- [ ] oracle/mia/ — agent layer change
- [ ] apps/website/ — frontend change
- [ ] agents/ — operator agent change
- [ ] canon/ — legacy canon update
- [ ] .github/ — repo governance change
- [ ] other

## Related Mission or Issue
Closes #[issue number] / Mission: MIA-XXX

## What Changed
- 
- 
- 

## Checklist
- [ ] Output is real and visible (not a placeholder)
- [ ] If oracle/docs/ changed — memory.md updated if needed
- [ ] If oracle/mia/ changed — missions.md and backlog.md reflect the change
- [ ] No silent drift — if a standard or structure changed, it is documented
- [ ] Next action is named below

## Next Action
What happens after this PR merges?
